name: Cheese Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded sharp process American cheese, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a skillet over medium-high heat; add onion and cook, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes or until tender.
2. Combine the onion, biscuit mix, and 1/2 cup cheese in a large bowl.
3. Whisk together the egg and milk. Add to the onion mixture, stirring just until moistened.
4. Spoon batter into greased muffin pans, filling about half-full. Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup cheese and sesame seeds; dot with remaining 1 tablespoon butter.
5. Bake at 400°F for 13 minutes or until golden. Remove from pans immediately and serve warm.
